title: Honeybadger Metric
description: A gauge, counter, or histogram metric recorded via Honeybadger.gauge/counter/histogram. All metric types share this event_type; differentiate by metric_type.

metric_name.description: Name of the metric as passed to the recording call.

samples.description: Number of observations recorded in this flush window.

request_id.description: Rails request UUID, present on any event fired during a web request context. Merged globally by the Honeybadger agent.

metric_source.description: Source plugin that recorded the metric, e.g. "rails", "sidekiq", "solid_queue", "net_http", "puma". Used to distinguish traits like rails_metrics, ruby_sidekiq_metrics, etc.

additionalProperties.description: Additional dynamic attributes attached to the metric at recording time.
